mapper.select: select concat('MP', lpad(cast(request_id as char), 3, '0')) as id, request_type as type, coalesce(course_type, '') as typeValue, coalesce(request_content, '') as content, date_format(submitted_at, '%m/%d %H:%i') as appliedAt, date_format(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as submittedAtValue, coalesce(nullif(mentor_name, ''), '待分配') as mentor, coalesce(nullif(mentor_meta, ''), '班主任分配中') as mentorMeta, coalesce(nullif(hours_feedback, ''), '-') as hours, coalesce(nullif(feedback_summary, ''), '-') as feedback, coalesce(nullif(feedback_hint, ''), '-') as feedbackHint, request_status as status from osg_student_mock_request where user_id = #{userId} and request_group = 'practice' order by submitted_at desc, request_id desc

select concat('#R', date_format(submitted_at, '%Y'), lpad(cast(request_id as char), 3, '0')) as id, request_type as type, coalesce(company, '') as company, request_status as status, date_format(submitted_at, '%m/%d/%Y') as submittedAt, date_format(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as submittedAtValue, coalesce(course_type, '') as courseType, coalesce(job_status, '') as jobStatus, coalesce(remark, '') as remark from osg_student_mock_request where user_id = #{userId} and request_group = 'course' order by submitted_at desc, request_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_student_mock_request ( user_id, request_group, request_type, course_type, company, job_status, request_status, request_content, request_reason, mentor_count, preferred_mentor, excluded_mentor, mentor_name, mentor_meta, hours_feedback, feedback_summary, feedback_hint, remark, submitted_at, completed_at, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{requestGroup}, #{requestType}, #{courseType}, #{company}, #{jobStatus}, #{requestStatus}, #{requestContent}, #{requestReason}, #{mentorCount}, #{preferredMentor}, #{excludedMentor}, #{mentorName}, #{mentorMeta}, #{hoursFeedback}, #{feedbackSummary}, #{feedbackHint}, #{remark}, sysdate(), null, sysdate(), sysdate() )
